fields.name: Start Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the data and time that the integration synchronization job started.

fields.name: Finish Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the integration synchronization job completed.

fields.name: Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies a message that occurred as a result of the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Integration Table Mapping Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table mapping that was used for the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Inserted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of new records that were created in the destination database table (such as the Dynamics 365 Sales Account entity or Business Central Customer table) by the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were modified in the destination database table (such as the Dynamics 365 Sales Account entity or Dynamics 365 Customer table) by the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Deleted
fields.tooltip: Specifies entries that were deleted when synchronizing Dynamics 365 Sales data and Dynamics 365 data.

fields.name: Unchanged
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were not changed in the destination database table (such as the Dynamics 365 Sales Account entity or Dynamics 365 Customer table) by the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Skipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were skipped during the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Failed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred during the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Synch. Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies in which direction data is synchronized.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Uncoupled
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were uncoupled during the integration synchronization job.

fields.name: Coupled
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that were coupled by matching an existing entity during the integration synchronization job.
